prop_77.proof_body:
induction xs with
| nil =>
    simp [insort]
| cons y ys ih =>
    intro hs
    cases hs with
    | nil =>
        simp [insort, hxy]
    | cons z zs hyzs hsorted =>
        by_cases hxy : x ≤ y
        · simp [insort, hxy, hyzs, hsorted]
        · simp [insort, hxy]
          exact ih hsorted

induction xs generalizing ys with
| nil =>
    intro h

    simp

    intro h
    have h' : length xs = length ys := by
      simpa using h
    simp [reverse, zip', ih ys h']

induction n generalizing xs with
| zero =>
    simp
| succ n ih =>
    cases xs with
    | nil =>
        simp
    | cons x xs =>
        simp [ih]
